description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, light beige or off-white fabric. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear plush and well-padded for comfort. Four decorative throw pillows, two in a solid light color and two with a subtle abstract pattern, are arranged symmetrically along the backrest. The armrests are gently flared and padded, rising slightly above the seat level and curving outward for a contemporary look. The base of the sofa is solid and continuous, with short, block-style legs barely visible beneath the frame. The overall design is clean, minimalistic, and suitable for both residential and urban public settings.
description: A modern, light beige three-seater sofa with plush cushions, flared padded armrests, and four decorative throw pillows. The design is clean and minimalistic, with a solid base and subtle block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, three backrest cushions, and four decorative throw pillows arranged symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gently flared, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the subtle presence of the throw pillows above the back edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the matching flared armrest and the arrangement of cushions along the seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all loose and uniform in size, with four loose throw pillows symmetrically placed.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, gently flared and padded armrests that rise slightly above the seat, with a smooth, continuous profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs located at the corners, recessed and minimally visible, likely made of wood or a dark material.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform backrest cushions and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric upholstery with no visible pattern or decorative stitching; throw pillows include both solid and subtle abstract patterned covers.
